No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to ending hunger or improving nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (4.3). Developing an 'International Perspective' through Arabic language learning fosters cultural diversity appreciation and global citizenship (4.7), and enhances relevant skills (4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to clean water and sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to affordable and clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course includes '旅遊、假期' (travel, vacation) as a topic, which could very indirectly relate to sustainable tourism (Target 8.9) by equipping students with language skills useful in the tourism sector.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to industry, innovation, or infrastructure.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Developing an 'International Perspective' through Arabic language learning fosters cross-cultural understanding and adaptation to other cultures, indirectly promoting social inclusion (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course, offered by the 'Arabic Language and Culture' department, fosters an appreciation for Arabic culture, indirectly contributing to safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to responsible consumption and production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to life below water.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives supports contributions to life on land.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Developing an 'International Perspective' through language fosters cross-cultural understanding and communication, which is a foundational element for promoting peace and non-discriminatory policies (Target 16.b).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing 'Arabic Listening & Speaking' skills and an 'International Perspective' directly enables international cooperation and partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.9) by facilitating cross-cultural communication.
